mapper.sql: project_id AS "projectId", name, role, summary, tech_stack AS "techStack", enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM project_deep_dive_project WHERE enabled = TRUE ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_deep_dive_project( project_id, name, role, summary, tech_stack, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{project.projectId}, #{project.name}, #{project.role}, #{project.summary}, #{project.techStack}, TRUE, #{now}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_deep_dive_project SET name = #{project.name}, role = #{project.role}, summary = #{project.summary}, tech_stack = #{project.techStack}, enabled = TRUE, updated_at = #{now} WHERE project_id = #{project.projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_deep_dive_material( material_id, project_id, file_name, content_type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{material.materialId}, #{material.projectId}, #{material.fileName}, #{material.contentType}, #{material.content}, #{now} )
mapper.select: SELECT material_id AS "materialId", project_id AS "projectId", file_name AS "fileName", content_type AS "contentType", content, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM project_deep_dive_material WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_deep_dive_question( question_id, project_id, question, answer, category, difficulty, source, created_at ) VALUES ( #{question.questionId}, #{projectId}, #{question.question}, #{question.answer}, #{question.category}, #{question.difficulty}, #{question.source}, #{now} )
mapper.select: SELECT question_id AS "questionId", project_id AS "projectId", question, answer, category, difficulty, source, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM project_deep_dive_question WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
